overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character exploring Senjo Gorge. The character traverses shallow streams, climbs rocky waterfalls, and ascends through narrow passages surrounded by vibrant purple wisteria trees and dramatic natural landscapes.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow stream bed in wisteria forest

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow stream water surrounded by purple flowering trees

entered.detail: dense grove of trees with hanging purple blossoms covering the landscape
shallow flowing water with visible rocky stream bed
tall rocky cliff face rising beside the stream
dark smoke plume rising from mountain peak in the distance

segments.scene_description: The samurai character walks through a shallow stream in Senjo Gorge, surrounded by dense purple wisteria trees in full bloom. The water flows gently over rocks as the character moves forward through the narrow gorge, with a distant plume of smoke visible against the blue sky.

events.description: transitions from stream water to rocky terrain beside waterfall

agents.ego_description: climbing up rocky ledges and boulders beside a cascading waterfall

entered.detail: tall waterfall cascading down the rock face with mist at the base
large moss-covered boulders and rocky outcrops

segments.scene_description: Leaving the stream behind, the character begins ascending rocky terrain beside a tall waterfall. The purple wisteria trees shift to the left as the character climbs higher on the rocks, with the waterfall becoming the central feature of the scene.

events.description: enters darker shaded narrow passage between high rock walls

agents.ego_description: navigating upward through a tight rocky crevice and narrow passage

entered.detail: tight vertical rock walls forming a narrow passage
small hardy plants growing in rock crevices

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker, narrow passage between high rock walls where sunlight is mostly blocked. The environment becomes more enclosed and rugged as the character continues ascending through the rocky gorge, leaving the waterfall and purple trees behind.

events.description: emerges from narrow rocks to open grassy plateau with panoramic views

agents.ego_description: walking through grassy meadow admiring views of distant mountains and forests

entered.detail: open grass-covered area with scattered wildflowers and gentle slopes
tall green leafy trees mixed with purple wisteria
mountain peak with the smoke plume visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow rocky passage, the scene opens into a sunlit grassy plateau with panoramic views. The purple wisteria forest reappears in the distance to the left, mixed with green trees, while the character explores the open meadow with the distant mountain and smoke plume visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that leads from a lush, floral gorge through a rugged ascent and finally into an expansive sunlit plateau. It begins with the samurai walking through a shallow stream beneath a canopy of blooming purple wisteria, with a distant plume of smoke marking the horizon. As the character leaves the water, the camera tracks an ascent up rocky terrain beside a towering waterfall, causing the wisteria to shift to the periphery. The scene then tightens into a dark, enclosed passage between high rock walls where the sunlight fades and the environment becomes increasingly rugged. Finally, the camera emerges from the narrow gorge to reveal a wide, grassy meadow under a bright sky, with the purple forests and distant mountains opening up into a panoramic vista.
